purpose: Edit an existing TB report's settings/columns — ADD/RENAME/REMOVE Remarks (REF) columns programmatically (UI path: 'Edit report -> Columns -> add remarks column -> Save').
transport: Engagement tab + monkeypatch-captured headers, injected XHR (same surface as wb_tbreportcomment — KC tokens dead for workbench-api).

reportFormat.columns: FULL column array — createReports column shape. Omission = REMOVAL.

gotchas: Body must be the COMPLETE settings (fetch tbreportedit first) — columns omitted from the array are removed.
Rename = change `name` on the Remarks_{N} entry; columnId stays N (positional, rename-proof).
Remarks entries need engagementId=clientId; other types must NOT carry it.
SPA reloads the page after save — page must be reloaded for new columns to render; a monkeypatch dies with it.
tbreportedit GET response is the createReports shape incl. remarksInlineView flag.
